columns.Name: CONTEST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of the table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of conversation.

columns.Name: IS_TIES_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: This column indicated whether ties allowd or not for corresponding competition

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the contest.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the start of the corresponding contest.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the end date of the corresponding contest.

columns.Name: CORPORATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates if a contest is a coporate contest rather than a regular contest.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the contest.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines what type participants are allowed to participate in the contest.

columns.Name: IMAGE_URI
columns.Comments: This column stores the image URI for the current contest.

columns.Name: PARTICIPATION_RATE_TARGET
columns.Comments: The column stores the target participation rate.

columns.Name: REWARD_ID
columns.Comments: This column is a FK to HWR_CNST_REWARD_B  table. (OBSOLETE)

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
